---
title: "Comparison Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
params:
  compare_type: "lecturers"   # "lecturers" | "courses"
  ids:          ""            # comma-separated IDs
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "compare_lecturers.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "compare_courses.R"))

compare_type <- params$compare_type
ids          <- strsplit(params$ids, ",")[[1]]

if (compare_type == "lecturers") {
  comp_data <- compare_lecturers(ids)
  label_col <- "lecturer_name"
} else {
  comp_data <- compare_courses(ids)
  label_col <- "code"
}
```

**Comparison Type:** `r tools::toTitleCase(compare_type)`

---

## Engagement Comparison

```{r eng-compare}
if (!is.null(comp_data) && nrow(comp_data) > 0) {
  comp_data$label <- comp_data[[label_col]]
  ggplot(comp_data, aes(x = reorder(label, avg_engagement),
                        y = avg_engagement, fill = label)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "", y = "Avg Engagement",
         title = sprintf("%s Engagement Comparison",
                         tools::toTitleCase(compare_type))) +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  cat("No data available for comparison.")
}
```

## Concentration Comparison

```{r conc-compare}
if (!is.null(comp_data) && nrow(comp_data) > 0) {
  comp_data$label <- comp_data[[label_col]]
  ggplot(comp_data, aes(x = reorder(label, avg_concentration),
                        y = avg_concentration, fill = label)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "", y = "Avg Concentration",
         title = "Concentration Comparison") +
    theme_minimal()
}
```

## Sessions Count

```{r sessions-compare}
if (!is.null(comp_data) && nrow(comp_data) > 0 && "n_sessions" %in% names(comp_data)) {
  comp_data$label <- comp_data[[label_col]]
  ggplot(comp_data, aes(x = label, y = n_sessions, fill = label)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
    labs(x = "", y = "Number of Sessions",
         title = "Sessions Comparison") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
}
```

## Detailed Table

```{r detail-table}
if (!is.null(comp_data) && nrow(comp_data) > 0) {
  show_cols <- intersect(c(label_col, "n_sessions",
                           "avg_engagement","avg_concentration",
                           "total_students"),
                         names(comp_data))
  knitr::kable(comp_data[, show_cols], digits = 3)
}
```
